summary: Complete design token transformation pipeline using Style Dictionary - from JSON token definitions to consumable CSS variables and SCSS

globalTokens.description: Global design tokens - colors, typography, spacing, borders, shadows
globalTokens.structure: Nested JSON with value, type, and description properties

componentTokens.purpose: Allows component-level customization while maintaining global consistency

outputFiles.description: Generated CSS custom properties and SCSS variables

tokenFormat.description: Design tokens follow DTCG standard with value, type, and optional description

tokenReferencePattern.description: Tokens can reference other tokens using curly brace syntax for cascading design decisions
tokenReferencePattern.benefit: Enables cascading design decisions and maintains consistency - change one token, update all references

color.description: Color tokens for all interactive, brand, text, status, and greyscale values
subcategories: interactive (default, secondary, hover, disabled, focus, visited)

spacing.description: Spacing tokens for margins, padding, gaps using consistent scale
spacing.usage: Applied via component margin props (mt, mr, mb, ml) or gap props

typography.description: Typography tokens including font families, sizes, weights, and line heights

fontSize.description: Numeric scale from smallest (1) to largest (7)

compositeTokens.description: Typography tokens can be composite shorthand values

borderRadius.description: Border radius tokens for rounded corners

borderWidth.description: Border width tokens for borders and outlines

shadows.note: Shadows defined directly in CSS variables, not through Style Dictionary

iconSize.description: Icon size tokens for consistent icon sizing

transformationSystem.description: Style Dictionary v3.7.1 transforms tokens from JSON to CSS/SCSS

customTransformers.description: Custom Style Dictionary transformers handle complex token types

typography.name: typography/shorthand
typography.purpose: Converts typography objects to CSS shorthand notation

boxShadow.name: box-shadow
boxShadow.purpose: Transforms shadow objects to CSS box-shadow values

border.name: border
border.purpose: Converts border objects to CSS border shorthand

namingConvention.description: All output tokens prefixed with --goa- for namespacing

figmaIntegration.description: How to map Figma design properties to GoA design tokens

colorMapping.process: Extract hex color from Figma → Match to closest GoA color token → Use token reference

spacingMapping.process: Extract pixel spacing from Figma → Convert to rem → Match to GoA spacing token
spacingMapping.usage: Apply via component props (mt, mb, gap) not hardcoded values

typographyMapping.process: Extract text style from Figma → Match to GoA typography token
typographyMapping.usage: Use GoabText component with size prop, not custom CSS

steps: 2. Run 'npm run build' in design-tokens directory
4. Rebuilt component libraries will pick up new tokens automatically
tokenChanges.propagation: Token changes propagate to ui-components via CSS imports

addingNewTokens.validation: Ensure proper value, type, and description fields
addingNewTokens.rebuild: Run npm run build to generate CSS/SCSS output

neverHardcodeValues.rule: NEVER use hardcoded color, spacing, or typography values in component code
neverHardcodeValues.reasoning: Maintains consistency and enables global theme changes

useComponentProps.rule: Apply spacing via component props (mt, mr, mb, ml), not custom CSS

tokenReferences.rule: Component tokens should reference global tokens when possible
tokenReferences.benefit: Changes to global tokens automatically cascade to component tokens

tokensNotUpdating.issue: Changed token values but not seeing updates in components
solutions: Run 'npm run build' in design-tokens directory
Check dist/tokens.css to verify token was generated correctly

invalidTokenValue.issue: Token reference not resolving (shows literal {token.name} in output)
invalidTokenValue.solution: Verify referenced token exists in token files with exact path

relatedKnowledge.componentUsage: See component definition files for how tokens are applied
relatedKnowledge.figmaWorkflow: See figma-to-code-workflow.json for design-to-code token mapping
relatedKnowledge.buildSystem: See technical-architecture.json for overall build pipeline
